description_long: This is a large, upright stone with a striking blue-green coloration on its main face, transitioning to lighter and earthier tones on its sides and back. The front surface displays a marbled pattern with deep blue veins and patches of white, giving it a visually dynamic appearance. The stone's sides are rough and irregular, with one side showing a mix of pale yellow and blue hues, while the back is predominantly tan and weathered. The overall shape is roughly rectangular but with natural, jagged edges and a slightly tapered top. The surface texture is coarse and unpolished, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements. This stone would serve as a prominent visual barrier or decorative feature in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A tall, blue-green marbled stone with rough, irregular sides and a coarse, unpolished surface. Its striking coloration and natural veining make it a visually prominent barrier or feature.
description_view_0: The front view reveals a vivid blue-green marbled face with deep veining and a rugged, upright profile.
description_view_1: The side view shows a rough, tan and pale blue surface with less color intensity and more weathered texture.
description_view_2: This view highlights a mix of pale yellow and blue patches on a rough, irregular surface, with more visible color variation.
description_view_3: The opposite side displays a predominantly blue, coarse surface with less marbling and a more uniform texture.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped public space
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: Prominent marbled veining and mottling, especially on the front face, with irregular color transitions and natural mineral streaks.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished with visible signs of natural weathering, including surface pitting and color fading on the sides and back.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with manicured urban elements but can blend with natural landscaping or other stone features; may be partially surrounded by grass or low vegetation.
